name: munadi-hope-center
description: Munadi Hope Center cinematic website prototype asset pipeline.

scripts.optimize:models: pnpm run optimize:models:biblia && pnpm run optimize:models:open-bible && pnpm run optimize:models:lectern && pnpm run optimize:models:door && pnpm run optimize:models:interior
scripts.optimize:models:biblia: gltf-transform optimize public/assets/models/original/biblia.glb public/assets/models/optimized/biblia.glb --compress meshopt --meshopt-level high --texture-compress webp --texture-size 2048
scripts.optimize:models:lectern: gltf-transform optimize public/assets/models/original/lectern.glb public/assets/models/optimized/lectern.glb --compress meshopt --meshopt-level high --texture-compress webp --texture-size 2048
